calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a Short Cause Trial sent forthwith from Department 206 for a request for judgment against Defendant Qardio, Inc. A Delaware Corporation.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 11:18:32 a.m. and concluding at 11:38:55 a.m. (D505).

Nathan D wirtschafter Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Cardiac RMS LLC
Defendant Qardio, Inc. A Delaware Corporation not appearing.
Witness Greg Forsythe, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Counsel to provide a summary for a request for default judgment.
Counsel examines witness.
Court cross examines the witness.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Written Agreement
Exhibit 2, 3 and 4: Invoices
Exhibit 5:letter from Defendant's former VP of sales for North America
Exhibit 6, 7 and 8: Invoices
Exhibit 13: Defendant terminating its contract with plaintiff
Exhibit 14: submitted 1099 of Defendant
Exhibit 16 : corrected 1099 of Defendant
Exhibit 18, 19 and 20: current list of open invoices

Witness confirms that declarations made, exhibits submitted are true and correct.
Request to dismiss Defendant does 1 to 10 is granted.

After hearing the testimony, reviewing the declaration, and considering the evidence, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:
Damages $26,925.00
Interest $3,334.89
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $435.00
Total Judgment $30,694.89

Proposed Judgment is signed and executed this day.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Nathan Wistschafter, Esq., Tel. 818.660.2518, appearing for plaintiff Cardiac RMS LLC;
Matt Ball, Esq., Tel. 415.882.8200, appearing for defendant Qardio, Inc.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT QARDIO, INC.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The matter is contested. Discussions regarding the proposed form of order are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Court granted the motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Malone. Matter not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Off Calendar
